summary.business_type: SaaS Tool / Finance Web Application — 23 free employment law calculators for UK, US, CA, AU
top_findings: Homepage missing canonical tag — Google may index multiple URL variants
All 23 tool OG images served as application/octet-stream instead of image/png
About page has no JSON-LD structured data
No compression on HTML responses (45KB uncompressed)
Homepage H1 is tagline-style, not keyword-targeted
quick_wins: Add canonical to homepage metadata (1 line in app/page.tsx)
Export contentType from opengraph-image.tsx files to fix MIME type
Add internal 'Related calculators' links to tool pages

categories.name: Technical SEO
what_works: HSTS preload, HTTPS enforced
robots.txt correct — all pages allowed
28-URL sitemap covering all tools
HTTP/2, 146ms TTFB from Cloudflare edge
Complete favicon set (ico, svg, 192, 512, apple-touch-icon)
CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options all set
All 23 OG image routes resolve HTTP 200

findings.title: Homepage missing canonical tag
findings.description: The homepage / returns no <link rel="canonical"> tag. Confirmed via HTML inspection. All 23 tool pages have correct canonical tags pointing to mypayrights.com.
findings.recommendation: Add `alternates: { canonical: SITE.url }` to the homepage metadata export in app/page.tsx

findings.title: Tool OG images served as application/octet-stream
findings.description: All 23 /[slug]/opengraph-image routes return content-type: application/octet-stream instead of image/png. The homepage /opengraph-image correctly returns image/png. This can cause LinkedIn and Slack to not render preview images.
findings.recommendation: Add `export const contentType = 'image/png';` to each app/[slug]/opengraph-image.tsx file, or export OG_CONTENT_TYPE from lib/ogImage.tsx and re-export it from each route file.

findings.title: No HTML compression
findings.description: Content-Encoding: none on 45KB homepage HTML. Cloudflare Pages should auto-compress. May be a Pages configuration or caching issue.
findings.recommendation: Verify Cloudflare Pages compression is enabled. Test with Accept-Encoding: gzip header.

categories.name: Content Quality
what_works: All 23 tool pages have substantive content blocks (1,600–2,980 total words)
FAQ section on every tool page (3–6 questions)
Statutory rates cited with effective dates
About page has E-E-A-T sections: rate verification process, team background
llms.txt comprehensive — all 23 tools described
Unique descriptions per page

findings.title: Three leave calculators borderline thin
findings.description: Paternity (1,627w), adoption (1,622w), and shared parental leave (1,635w) pages are at the lower content threshold for competitive calculator terms.
findings.recommendation: Expand content blocks with: qualification eligibility walkthrough, worked salary examples, HMRC reclaim process for employers, and comparison with enhanced employer pay.

findings.title: Homepage word count low
findings.description: Homepage has ~1,188 total words, serving primarily as a navigation hub with one H2 section.
findings.recommendation: Add a grouped tool directory with category H2s (Employment, Pay & Tax, Leave & Benefits) and a brief intro paragraph explaining why country-aware calculators matter.

findings.title: About page has no structured data
findings.description: About page has strong E-E-A-T content but no JSON-LD. Zero schema blocks detected.
findings.recommendation: Add WebPage + Organization JSON-LD to app/about/page.tsx using the existing homepageSchemas() helper or a new aboutPageSchema().

categories.name: On-Page SEO
what_works: All 23 tool pages have unique, descriptive title tags
Meta descriptions under 160 chars and keyword-relevant
H1 matches primary keyword on every tool page
Canonical tags on all tool pages pointing to production domain

findings.title: Homepage H1 is tagline, not keyword-targeted
findings.description: Current H1: 'Pay rights calculators that know your country's rules' — no primary keyword ('pay calculator', 'employment calculator', 'statutory pay') in the H1.
findings.recommendation: Revise to include primary keywords: e.g., 'Free Employment Pay Calculators for UK & US' or 'Statutory Pay Calculators — UK, US, Canada & Australia'

findings.title: No internal links between related tool pages
findings.description: Tool pages have no cross-links to related calculators. Redundancy pay has no link to Notice Period; Take-home pay has no link to IR35; PTO Payout has no link to Final Paycheck.
findings.recommendation: Add 'Related calculators' section to each tool page with 2–3 relevant tool links. This improves crawl depth, PageRank distribution, and user journey.

findings.title: No visible breadcrumb navigation
findings.description: BreadcrumbList schema exists on all tool pages but no visible breadcrumb UI. Google uses visible breadcrumbs to confirm schema and improve SERP display.
findings.recommendation: Add a visible <nav aria-label='Breadcrumb'> with Home > Tool Name on each tool page, matching the JSON-LD.

categories.name: Schema / Structured Data
what_works: WebApplication schema on all 23 tool pages
FAQPage schema on all 23 tool pages
BreadcrumbList schema on all 23 tool pages
WebSite + Organization on homepage
priceCurrency correctly region-mapped (GBP for UK, USD for US)
featureList present on all WebApplication schemas

findings.title: About page missing JSON-LD
findings.description: About page has 0 schema blocks. Missed Organization and WebPage rich result opportunity.
findings.recommendation: Add Organization + WebPage schema to app/about/page.tsx

findings.title: Homepage missing ItemList or SiteLinksSearchBox schema
findings.description: The homepage WebSite schema has no potentialAction (SearchAction) for SiteLinksSearchBox, and no ItemList pointing to the 23 tools.
findings.recommendation: Add potentialAction SearchAction to WebSite schema, and/or an ItemList of top tools.

categories.name: Performance (CWV)
what_works: 146ms TTFB — excellent Cloudflare edge performance
HTTP/2
Static export — no SSR computation on request
Logo preloaded
No heavy third-party analytics

findings.title: No HTML response compression
findings.description: 45KB homepage HTML served without gzip/brotli. Expected compression would reduce to ~10KB.
findings.recommendation: Check Cloudflare Pages compression settings. Add _headers file if needed with Content-Encoding: gzip.

findings.title: Tabler Icons webfont loaded from CDN (potential render-block)
findings.description: Stylesheet for Tabler Icons loaded from cdn.jsdelivr.net via <link> in <head>. External CSS can block rendering.
findings.recommendation: Either self-host the icon subset, add media='print' onload trick for async load, or migrate to @tabler/icons-react SVG imports (tree-shaken, zero webfont).

categories.name: AI Search Readiness
what_works: llms.txt present and comprehensive
All AI crawlers allowed by robots.txt
Factual, dated, cited content — highly citable by AI
Statutory rate references with effective dates on every page
Answer-first content structure

findings.title: No explicit AI crawler permission signals
findings.description: robots.txt uses global Allow: / rather than explicit GPTBot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended entries. While this works, explicit entries send a positive signal.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit User-Agent blocks for GPTBot, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot with Allow: /

findings.title: Organization sameAs links absent
findings.description: Organization schema has no sameAs pointing to social/professional profiles.
findings.recommendation: Add sameAs array to Organization schema with LinkedIn, GitHub, or other verified profiles.

categories.name: Images
what_works: All OG images generated dynamically (200 OK)
Favicon complete set
Logo SVG optimised
No decorative images without alt text detected

findings.title: Tool OG images missing image/png content-type
findings.description: See Technical SEO findings. All 23 tool OG image routes return application/octet-stream.

phases.name: Phase 1: Critical Fixes
items: Add canonical tag to homepage (app/page.tsx) — 1 line change
Fix OG image content-type — export contentType from all 23 opengraph-image.tsx files
Add JSON-LD to About page (Organization + WebPage schema)
Investigate and fix missing HTML compression

phases.name: Phase 2: High-Impact SEO
items: Revise homepage H1 to include primary keyword
Add 'Related calculators' internal links to all 23 tool pages
Add ItemList or SiteLinksSearchBox schema to homepage

phases.name: Phase 3: Content & Authority
items: Expand paternity, adoption, shared parental leave pages by 600–800 words each
Expand homepage with category-grouped tool directory and intro copy
Add explicit AI crawler permission entries to robots.txt
Add sameAs links to Organization schema
Submit to employment law resource directories and relevant Reddit communities

phases.name: Phase 4: Performance & Monitoring
items: Migrate Tabler Icons to SVG imports (eliminate webfont CDN dependency)
Set up Google Search Console on production domain
Monitor CrUX data once production gets sufficient traffic
Set up drift baseline for future audit comparison
